title: Validate and Align Documentation with Project Tooling
description: Ensure CONTRIBUTING.md instructions match actual project scripts, Husky hooks, and monorepo workflow.
details: Verify that all commands in CONTRIBUTING.md (install, dev, test, lint, format) match those in package.json and Husky configuration. Confirm that instructions for running tests and linters are accurate and up-to-date. Adjust documentation as needed to reflect the current project setup and enforce consistency.
test_strategy: Manually execute each documented command in a fresh environment to confirm correctness. Update documentation if discrepancies are found.

title: Add CONTRIBUTING.md Link to README.md
description: Increase visibility of the contribution guide by linking it from the main README.md.
details: Edit the root README.md to add a prominent link to CONTRIBUTING.md, ideally near the top or in a 'Getting Started' or 'Contributing' section. Use clear language to direct new contributors to the guide.
test_strategy: Check that the link appears correctly in README.md and navigates to CONTRIBUTING.md in GitHub/GitLab UI. Confirm visibility and clarity.

title: Peer Review and Finalize Documentation
description: Solicit feedback on CONTRIBUTING.md and README.md changes, then finalize and commit.
details: Request a review from at least one team member or a new contributor. Incorporate feedback to improve clarity, accuracy, or completeness. Make final edits and commit both files to the repository.
test_strategy: Ensure all reviewer suggestions are addressed. Confirm that the documentation is clear, correct, and ready for public contributors.

title: Draft Comprehensive CONTRIBUTING.md
description: Create a detailed CONTRIBUTING.md at the repository root to guide new contributors through setup, workflow, standards, testing, and PR process.
details: Research the monorepo's package.json scripts, Husky pre-commit hooks, and overall structure. Draft sections: Code of Conduct, Getting Started (prerequisites, installation), Development Workflow (running frontend/backend), Coding Standards (linting, formatting), Running Tests, and Submitting a Pull Request. Include a table of contents and clear, copy-paste-ready commands. Mention any relevant deployment or environment notes. Ensure clarity for developers new to monorepos.
test_strategy: Review the document for completeness, accuracy, and clarity. Cross-check all commands and steps by following them in a clean clone. Solicit feedback from a new contributor or teammate to validate usability.
